basic_details.job_title: Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Notification 2026 has been released on 04 July 2026 on the official website https://balangir.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 6 Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist vacancies have been announced through the Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University, Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute, Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. standard, Completed at least 5 years of continuous regular service in Group-D cadre
qualification.details: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. standard Completed at least 5 years of continuous regular service in Group-D cadre

selection_process: Written Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://balangir.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Balangir District Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized University Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. standard Completed at least 5 years of continuous regular service in Group-D cadre

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva Voce Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://balangir.dcourts.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist posts is 25 July 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post in the Balangir District Court Recruitment 2026. This offers a good opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist posts in Balangir District Court is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist in Balangir District Court?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 19900 to Rs. 63200 per month. This is a competitive salary for government jobs.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the +3 examination or equivalent, hold a Diploma in Computer Application, passed Oriya equivalent to M.E. standard, and completed 5 years of Group-D service.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Balangir District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, a Computer Science Test (Practical), and a Viva Voce Test. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for selection.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form for Balangir District Court Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Balangir District Court, which is https://balangir.dcourts.gov.in. Ensure to download the correct form.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist posts in Balangir District Court.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for Balangir District Court Recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for Balangir District Court is https://balangir.dcourts.gov.in. All official notifications and updates will be available on this portal.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is Balangir District Court located in?
faq.answer: Balangir District Court is located in Balangir, which is a city in the state of Odisha. This recruitment is for positions within this district.
